title: Neural Progenitor Cell Banking Protocol
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x89frz6

steps.title: Upon reaching at least 85% confluency,...
steps.instruction: Upon reaching at least 85% confluency, harvest neural progenitor cells as described in protocol below. Neural progenitor expansion protocol

steps.title: Add equal volumes of NIM and...
steps.instruction: Add equal volumes of NIM and 2x neural freezing medium to the NPC cell suspension for a final 1 x 10 6 cells/mL.

steps.title: Gently mix solution and distribute 1 mL into sterile cryovials
steps.instruction: Gently mix solution and distribute 1 mL into sterile cryovials. Store cryovials in Styrofoam containers at -80 °C for 48:00:00 and then transfer to liquid nitrogen for long-term storage.

steps.title: Perform a cell count in 3...
steps.instruction: Perform a cell count in 3 mL of NIM using a hemacytometer.
